lessons.title: Introducing the data - “How can we use this information?”
Learn how to read graphs (bar, line, pie) - How to pull information from graphs - differentiate graphs by aptitude level
Introduce dataset for bar graph (ASPCA or St Huberts)
Introduce dataset for Pie Chart (ASPCA or St Huberts)
Introduce dataset for Line graph (ASPCA or St Huberts)
